name: Narrative Physics Detection Signatures
description: Measurable signatures that distinguish manipulation from practice. Each signature maps to a CORDYCEPS pattern and a Rosetta sensor.

genuine.description: Following claimed constraints >70% of the time

ambiguous.description: Mixed signals — could be struggling or selective

manipulation.description: Claiming constraints while violating >70% of them
Violates constraints whenever they cost something

consistency_ratio.fires_when: Constraint applied equally across groups = compassion sensor active. Constraint broken by group = compassion suppressed.

ingroup_bias.fires_when: Autonomy respected for all groups = dignity intact. Autonomy denied to out-group = dignity violated.

rationalization_density.fires_when: Explanations for violations multiply = vigilance spikes. Pattern doesn't match model.

selective_application.fires_when: Boundary breached. Constraint violated when costly = boundary not real.

threat_framing.fires_when: Out-group constructed as threat to justify constraint violation.

cordyceps_mapping.description: Each manipulation signature maps to a known CORDYCEPS parasitic pattern

patterns.mechanism: Constraints that would lead to empathy with out-group are suppressed
One shape (set of rules) for us, a cage for them
Origin of the violation is hidden behind explanatory narrative
CUBE containment weaponized — out-group must be contained/destroyed
Physics gates bypassed — contradictory constraints held simultaneously
Only one source of truth allowed. Questions = heresy.
